title: Visa Trusted Agent Protocol Signature Inspector & Readiness
description: Inspects Visa Trusted Agent Protocol (TAP) HTTP Message Signatures — the agent-recognition signature and replay protection (timestamp, session id, key id, algorithm) — and scores TAP readiness. Built on RFC 9421 and aligned with Web Bot Auth. TAP-specific labels are illustrative — verify against Visa Developer.

mcp_tool_definition.name: inspect_visa_tap_signature
mcp_tool_definition.description: Inspect a Visa Trusted Agent Protocol HTTP Message Signature and score TAP readiness.
